title: Evangelions distinctive typography will be sold on CD ROM in the Evangelion Store
display_title: Evangelions distinctive typography will be sold on CD ROM in the Evangelion Store
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion’s distinctive typography will be sold on CD-ROM in the Evangelion Store.             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Nov 08, 2016 9:36 am As a designer, not to mention Eva nerd, part of me really wants this. http://www.evamonkey.com/evangelions-di ... ion-store/

[]: Re: Evangelion’s distinctive typography will be sold on CD-ROM in the Evangelion Store.             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Nov 08, 2016 6:10 pm Not interested in the Japanese, and the English is usually just Bodoni stetched out taller or wider than normal.

[]: Re: Evangelion’s distinctive typography will be sold on CD-ROM in the Evangelion Store.             Quote Post by mammaluser » Tue Nov 22, 2016 6:24 pm Interesting, maybe no that interested in the Japanese font (mostly because i don't really know Japanese), but most likely in the english one. And im also a designer (at least a yet to be designer)

[]: Re: Evangelion’s distinctive typography will be sold on CD-ROM in the Evangelion Store.             Quote Post by robersora » Wed Nov 23, 2016 8:39 am I think that's pretty cool, as the font looks awesome as f***.
